prerequisites: An IP2Location.io account (sign up free at ip2location.io) to obtain an IP2WHOIS API key.
An IP2WHOIS API key, supplied via the connector's api_key field.
A target domain name to look up, supplied via the connector's domain field.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: IP2WHOIS authenticates with a single API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. The API accepts the key as the key query parameter on requests to https://api.ip2whois.com/v2. Obtain the key by registering a free account at ip2location.io.

setupSteps.title: Create an account and get an API key
setupSteps.body: Register a free account at ip2location.io and copy the API key from your dashboard. The free plan allows up to 500 WHOIS domain lookups per month, and no credit card is required.

setupSteps.title: Set the API key
setupSteps.body: Paste your IP2WHOIS API key into the connector's api_key field. It is sent as the key query parameter to the IP2WHOIS v2 endpoint (https://api.ip2whois.com/v2).

setupSteps.title: Configure the domain
setupSteps.body: Set the domain field to the domain name you want to look up (for example example.com). It is sent as the domain query parameter to the IP2WHOIS API.

sources.title: IP2WHOIS Domain WHOIS API documentation - IP2Location.io
